query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Verified early-intervention or Part C agency rows.
Verified regional education or district pages with special-education routing.

samples.sample_name: Maine Department of Education Special Services and Inclusive Education

query_basis: Reviewed current Maine DOE selector roots plus live school_district fallback inventory; generated a manual-export packet from the current blocker state.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-23 current Maine education blocker artifacts plus the live school_districts DB rows. Fourteen county rows still point at the statewide special-education root https://www.maine.gov/doe/learning/specialed and two rows still point at the generic DOE root https://www.maine.gov/doe, while all 16 rows use the statewide special-education page as the website field. The official DOE workbook plus live NEO town and SAU selector pages remain the correct local-routing authoring roots, but bounded POST replays with concrete public organizations such as Portland Public Schools (OrgId 364), York Public Schools (OrgId 542), and RSU 60/MSAD 60 (OrgId 913) still return HTTP 500 before yielding verified local contact rows or an export file. Maine therefore still needs reviewed browser-assisted capture or manual export, but the next lane can now work from a deterministic packet instead of rereading the same statewide selectors.

samples.sample_name: List of SAUs by Municipality Workbook
samples.evidence_snippet: The official workbook is live and lists YearCode, OrganizationName, OrganizationId, and Organization Type for SAUs and municipalities, but it does not carry direct superintendent or special-education contact fields.
The public page is live and enumerates Maine towns in a reviewed selector, proving a real local-routing search contract exists on the official host before result submission.

The public page is live and exposes a CSRF token, OrgId options, and explicit action:CSearchBySAU and action:SAUExport submit names in raw HTML, but bounded POST replays with concrete public organizations still returned HTTP 500 instead of contact rows or an export file.

The official NEO dashboard exposes SAU Contact Search and superintendent lookup routes, but the public result/export actions behind that dashboard still fail before returning verified local contact data.

query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Maine evidence on disk explicitly states that DRM is the federally mandated protection and advocacy system for Maine.

samples.evidence_snippet: Disability Rights Maine (DRM) is the federally mandated protection and advocacy system for Maine.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party Maine Parent Federation evidence on disk explicitly preserves the Parent Training & Info (PTI) program designation.

samples.evidence_snippet: Parent Training & Info (PTI). The Parent Information Center is not a legal services agency. Maine Parent Federation.

query_basis: Reviewed Pine Tree Legal Assistance homepage now provides direct statewide Maine legal-aid evidence.

samples.evidence_snippet: Pine Tree Legal Assistance states that it provides free civil legal aid in Maine and preserves statewide legal-help topics including rental housing, money and debt, health and public benefits, domestic violence, and divorce and family matters.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed current Maine DHHS district office directory plus live county_offices fallback inventory; generated a county-mapping packet from the current blocker state.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-23 current Maine county-office blocker artifacts plus the live county_offices DB rows. The official DHHS District Office Locations page is real and preserves district office addresses, phones, and eligibility notes, but it still does not publish county coverage or a public town/county lookup contract. A live DB reconciliation shows 16 Maine county-office rows still depend on the DOI mirror source https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/AVRHMI and 4 rows still use the dead legacy fallback https://dhhs.maine.gov/locations. The unresolved multi-office counties on the current packet are Aroostook (Caribou, Fort Kent, Houlton), Washington (Calais, Machias), and York (Biddeford, Sanford). Maine therefore still lacks a county-to-office contract, but the next lane can now work from a deterministic mapping packet instead of rereading the same district office directory.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official DHHS page lists district offices such as Bangor, Biddeford, Calais, Caribou, Ellsworth, Machias, Portland, and Skowhegan with addresses and phones, but it does not assign counties to those offices.
